items.title: Ebola treatments trial begins in the Democratic Republic of Congo
items.dek: According to WHO data, there have been 1,406 confirmed cases of the disease in DRC, with 301 suspected cases and 438 deaths.
items.body: According to WHO data, there have been 1,406 confirmed cases of the disease in DRC, with 301 suspected cases and 438 deaths.

items.title: Can't afford a snazzy library? Fake it with wallpaper and then add a drop of old book scent to make it seem real. Reported by Rare Book Hub Monthly July 2026
items.dek: A major advantage of wallpaper bookshelves is they take up very little floor space.....Still, you may think photo bookshelves aren't quite real. After all, old
items.body: A major advantage of wallpaper bookshelves is they take up very little floor space.....Still, you may think photo bookshelves aren't quite real. After all, old books have that distinctive old books scent which wallpaper doesn't have. No problem. A company called M&T Scents offers all sorts of strange perfumes...... One of them is called “Vintage Bookstore.” submitted by /u/Hammer_Price [link] [comments]
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Former Olympian indicted for allegedly vandalising Washington Reflecting Pool
items.dek: US authorities charged him with property destruction after renovations championed by President Donald Trump appeared to go awry.
items.body: US authorities charged him with property destruction after renovations championed by President Donald Trump appeared to go awry.
